chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 506 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA 2153/2023 2. For hearing of main case 19-04-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate files power on behalf of respondents No.2&3, which is taken on record. He states that the petitioner has applied for early retirement from municipal services through an application made to the Municipal Commissioner, SMC, Sukkur (respondent No.2), which shall be decided in accordance with law within a period of 60 days hereof. Learned counsel for the petitioner, on being satisfied, does not press this petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of along with listed application directing to respondent No.2 to decide petitioner’s application, as referred to above, in accordance with law within a period of 60 days hereof. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
